description_long: This apple has a rounded, slightly asymmetrical shape with a shallow dimple at the top where the stem would be. Its skin displays a gradient of colors, with a deep reddish-brown hue covering much of the surface and a lighter, creamy pink blush on one side. The surface appears smooth with a subtle matte finish, and faint speckles are visible in the lighter areas. The apple's form is plump and firm, with no visible stem or leaf attached. There are no noticeable blemishes, cuts, or bruises on the skin. The coloration and texture suggest it is fresh and likely crisp inside.
description: A round apple with a reddish-brown and pink gradient, smooth and unblemished skin.
description_view_0: Mostly dark reddish-brown with a hint of pink at the top, shallow dimple visible.
description_view_1: Lighter pink and cream side dominates, smooth and speckled surface, dimple at top.
description_view_2: Pinkish area is prominent, with a clear division to the darker side.
description_view_3: Curved, light pink surface with subtle speckles, dimple at top left.
